title: Ambigram Readability
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for testing whether generated lettering can remain readable as a deliberate ambigram under rotation, mirror logic, and material constraints.

en.title: Ambigram Readability
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for testing whether generated lettering can remain readable as a deliberate ambigram under rotation, mirror logic, and material constraints.

zh-CN.title: Ambigram 双向字 · 旋转 180° 可读
zh-CN.description: 测试双向字形工程: 正读、倒读、镜像和材质应用中,指定文字必须清晰、无多余字符,几何规则可被肉眼验证。
